name: loop-spec-toolkit
description: A marketplace of Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: loop-spec
plugins.description: One entry point that takes a piece of software work, settles the right set of spec docs for it — recommended with the user or selected autonomously — and builds each doc in dependency order to full standalone quality.

plugins.name: loop-specs
plugins.description: Generate grounded improvement ideas, shape them into requirements docs, turn those into implementation plans and ship them, review the changes, and design the JTBD and supporting spec docs.
